title: SkySpam
description: SkySpam add AntiSpam AntiIP AntiLink and more features.
body:
**✅Advanced Spam Detection** - Message
cooldown, repeated message detection, caps filter, character spam detection

**🌍Link Filter** - Blocks URLs with whitelist support, detects shortened links

**⚡IP Filter** - Blocks IP addresses (including obfuscated formats like 192.168.1.1, 192 168 1 1)

**📸Promotion Filter** - Keyword-based detection requiring multiple matches

**📢Violation System** - Automatic warn mute kick progression with configurable thresholds

**🔥Staff Alerts** - Real-time notifications with sounds for violations and punishments

**😍Full Permissions** - Bypass permissions for each filter type

**❤️Admin Commands** - Reload config, clear violations, check player violations

**💜MiniMessage Support** - Hex colors and gradients in all messages

## 🏁 PERMISSIONS:-
**skyspam.bypass**- Bypass All Spam Filter.
**skyspam.bypass.spam**- Bypass Spam Detection.
**skyspam.bypass.links**- Bypass Link Filter.
**skyspam.bypass.ip**- Bypass IP Filter.
**skyspam.bypass.promotion**- Bypass Prmotion Filter.
**skyspam.staff**- Receive Staff Alerts.
**skyspam.admin**- Access Admin Commands.
**skyspam.clear**- Clear Player Violations.
